caption: In a room with wood-paneled walls, several people are seated in rows, facing a podium where a woman stands. She wears a white blouse and a dark vest, looking down at papers on the podium. In the foreground, a woman in a bright yellow shirt and a man in a maroon hoodie sit with their backs to the viewer. Other attendees, including a man in a light-colored shirt and a woman in a white sweater, are also present. On the right side of the image, the text "ORCA" is displayed in white letters on a dark background. Across the sequence, the scene remains largely static; the people remain in their seats, and the woman at the podium continues her presentation with minimal movement, maintaining her focus on the documents before her.
